prompt: 彼女は病気___も、出勤した。
optionsJson: ["にもかかわらず","なのに","でも","だから"]
explanation: にもかかわらず (despite / in spite of) — despite being sick, she went to work.

prompt: 試験を受け___、準備が足りなかった。
optionsJson: ["たものの","たのに","たから","たので"]
explanation: ものの (although / even though — with sense of reservation) — although I took the exam, my preparation was insufficient.

prompt: この問題を解く___、特別な知識が必要だ。
optionsJson: ["のには","のにも","のにさえ","のにで"]
explanation: のには (in order to ~ / for ~ing) — in order to solve this problem, specialized knowledge is needed.

prompt: 親___、子供の成長を楽しみにするものだ。
optionsJson: ["というものは","というのは","というものが","というものを"]
explanation: というものは (parents as a concept / ~ by nature) — parents by nature look forward to their child's growth.

prompt: この計画、うまくいく___がしない。
explanation: 気がする (have a feeling that ~) — I have a feeling this plan won't go well.

prompt: 彼は賢い___、時々子供っぽい行動をする。
optionsJson: ["くせに","のに","にしては","のくせして"]
explanation: くせに (despite / even though — mild criticism) — despite being smart, he sometimes acts childishly.

prompt: どれだけ練習し___、完璧にはなれない。
explanation: ても (even if) — no matter how much you practice, you can't become perfect.

prompt: あなたにとって、家族___大切なものはない。
explanation: ほど〜ない (nothing is as ~ as) — for you, there is nothing as important as family.

prompt: 彼の説明は詳しい___、かえってわかりにくい。
explanation: ほど (the more ~ / so ~ that) — his explanation is so detailed that it actually becomes harder to understand.

prompt: 試合が近づく___、練習の量を増やした。
optionsJson: ["につれて","にとって","によって","として"]
explanation: につれて (as ~ / in proportion to) — as the match approached, I increased the amount of practice.

prompt: 国際化が進む___、外国語教育が重要になってきた。
optionsJson: ["とともに","につれて","によって","として"]
explanation: とともに (along with / together with) — along with globalization, foreign language education has become important.

prompt: 彼女はプロ___、舞台で素晴らしいパフォーマンスを見せた。
optionsJson: ["だけあって","にしては","のくせに","として"]
explanation: だけあって (as expected of ~ / worthy of) — as expected of a professional, she gave a wonderful performance on stage.

prompt: 授業中に笑わ___にはいられなかった。
explanation: ずにはいられない (cannot help but ~) — I couldn't help but laugh during class.

prompt: 彼が来る___に、準備を済ませておいた。
explanation: まえに (before ~ / ahead of ~) — I finished preparations before he arrived.

prompt: ここは観光地___、いつも人が多い。
optionsJson: ["だけあって","にしては","として","のに"]
explanation: だけあって (as expected of / befitting) — as expected of a tourist destination, it's always crowded.

prompt: もっと若い___に、もっと勉強しておけばよかった。
explanation: うちに (while ~ / before it's too late) — I wish I had studied more while I was still young.

prompt: 天気がいい___に、洗濯物を干した。
explanation: うちに (while / taking advantage of the time) — while the weather is good, I hung the laundry out to dry.

prompt: 彼の研究は医療の発展___貢献している。
explanation: に貢献する (contribute to ~) — his research contributes to the advancement of medicine.

prompt: 新しい政策___、反対意見が多い。
optionsJson: ["に対して","にとって","によって","として"]
explanation: に対して (against / toward) — there are many opposing opinions toward the new policy.

prompt: 彼女の判断___、プロジェクトの方向が決まった。
optionsJson: ["によって","にとって","に対して","として"]
explanation: によって (by / depending on) — the direction of the project was decided by her judgment.

prompt: 長年の夢___、ようやく世界旅行ができた。
optionsJson: ["であった","だった","であり","のだった"]
explanation: 〜であった (formal past copula) — having been a long-cherished dream, I was finally able to travel the world.

prompt: 体調が悪い___か、顔色が悪い。
optionsJson: ["のではない","ではない","のでない","ではなく"]
explanation: のではないか (I wonder if ~ / perhaps ~) — I wonder if she's not feeling well — her complexion looks bad.

prompt: この仕事___に集中しなければ、うまくいかない。
explanation: だけ (only / just) — if you only focus on this work, it won't go well (need to focus exclusively).

prompt: 病院に行った___、思ったより深刻だとわかった。
explanation: たところ (upon doing ~ / when I did ~ and found) — when I went to the hospital, I found out it was more serious than I thought.

prompt: 彼女の小説は世界中の人々___読まれている。
explanation: に読まれる (be read by ~) — her novels are read by people all around the world.

prompt: 彼は笑顔___話しかけてきた。
explanation: で (with / in a state of) — he came to talk to me with a smile.

prompt: 子供___、大人の言うことを聞くものだ。
optionsJson: ["というのは","というのが","というものは","というのを"]
explanation: というのは (as for ~ / ~ by nature) — children by nature are supposed to listen to what adults say.

prompt: 彼女___、この問題を解ける人はいない。
optionsJson: ["以外に","だけに","しかに","のみに"]
explanation: 以外に (other than ~ / except for ~) — other than her, there is no one who can solve this problem.

prompt: 彼女を信じ___から、裏切られた時はとても辛かった。
optionsJson: ["ていた","ている","ていて","ていれば"]
explanation: ていた (had been ~ing) — because I had been trusting her, it was very painful when I was betrayed.

prompt: どんなに高くても、買わ___にはいられない。
explanation: ずにはいられない (cannot help but ~) — no matter how expensive it is, I can't help but buy it.

prompt: 彼は嘘をついた___、謝ろうとしない。
explanation: くせに (despite / even though — criticism) — despite having lied, he refuses to apologize.

prompt: あの映画は何度見て___、感動する。
explanation: ても (even if / no matter how many times) — no matter how many times I watch that movie, I'm always moved.

prompt: この作業は時間が___ため、後回しにした。
optionsJson: ["かかる","かかった","かかって","かかれる"]
explanation: かかるため (because it takes / because it requires) — because this task takes time, I put it off.

prompt: このプロジェクトが成功する___、チームワークが不可欠だ。
optionsJson: ["ためには","ために","ためだ","ためか"]
explanation: ためには (in order to) — in order for this project to succeed, teamwork is indispensable.

prompt: 彼女は成功した。それは努力の___だ。
optionsJson: ["たまもの","はずもの","わけもの","こともの"]
explanation: たまもの (fruit of / result of) — she succeeded. That is the fruit of her efforts.

prompt: 部屋が散らかって___、集中できない。
explanation: ていて (being in the state of / because it is) — because the room is messy, I can't concentrate.

prompt: この試験___合格したのだから、自信を持っていい。
explanation: に合格する (pass ~) — since you passed this exam, you can have confidence.

prompt: 彼女はいつも笑顔で___、周りを明るくする。
explanation: いて (being ~ / while being ~) — by always being smiling, she brightens those around her.

prompt: 友達の結婚式に___、ネクタイを締めた。
optionsJson: ["出席するので","出席するのに","出席するから","出席するため"]
explanation: ので (because / since) — since I'm attending a friend's wedding, I wore a tie.

prompt: 練習すれ___するほど、上手くなる。
explanation: ば〜ほど (the more ~ the more ~) — the more you practice, the better you get.

prompt: 知れ___知るほど、日本語は難しい。
explanation: ば〜ほど (the more ~ the more ~) — the more you learn about it, the more difficult Japanese is.

prompt: 彼女の言葉___、元気が出てきた。
optionsJson: ["によって","のおかげで","のせいで","のために"]
explanation: によって (by / through) — I was energized by her words.

prompt: 彼は疲れて___も、仕事を続けた。
explanation: いても (even though being in the state of) — even though he was tired, he continued working.

prompt: これは私が長年___夢だ。
optionsJson: ["温めてきた","温めてみた","温めておいた","温めてしまった"]
explanation: てきた (has been ~ing over time) — this is a dream I have been nurturing over many years.

prompt: レポートを書き終わっ___、提出した。
explanation: てから (after ~ing) — after finishing writing the report, I submitted it.

prompt: この本を読む___で、歴史への興味が深まった。
explanation: ことで (by / through ~ing) — by reading this book, my interest in history deepened.

prompt: 予算___、どんな部品を使うかが決まる。
optionsJson: ["次第で","によって","に従って","に応じて"]
explanation: 次第で (depending on) — depending on the budget, what parts to use will be decided.

prompt: 英語が上手に話せる___、海外で仕事がしやすい。
explanation: ほど (the more ~ / to the degree that) — the better you can speak English, the easier it is to work overseas.

prompt: 外国語を学ぶ___、母国語の大切さがわかる。
optionsJson: ["ことで","ことから","ことに","ことが"]
explanation: ことで (by / through ~ing) — by learning a foreign language, you come to understand the importance of your mother tongue.

prompt: このような事故が___よう、安全管理を徹底した。
optionsJson: ["起きない","起きる","起きた","起きている"]
explanation: ように (so that / in order that) — I thoroughly managed safety so that an accident like this would not happen.

prompt: もっと早く帰れ___よかったのに、仕事が終わらなかった。
explanation: ばよかったのに (I wish ~ / it would have been good if ~) — I wish I could have gone home earlier, but work didn't finish.

prompt: 彼女は医者___、患者に優しく接する。
optionsJson: ["として","にとって","によって","に対して"]
explanation: として (as / in the role of) — as a doctor, she treats patients kindly.

prompt: この話を誰かに伝え___にはいられなかった。
explanation: ずにはいられない (cannot help but ~) — I couldn't help but tell this story to someone.

prompt: 今日中に終わらせるべき仕事が___。
optionsJson: ["山ほどある","山ほどない","山だけある","山しかない"]
explanation: 山ほど (an enormous amount / mountains of) — there is an enormous amount of work that should be finished by today.

prompt: 彼女にとって、仕事___生活の一部だ。
explanation: にとって〜は (for ~ / ~は is the topic) — for her, work is part of her life.

prompt: あなた___来てくれれば、何も心配しない。
explanation: さえ〜ば (if only ~ / as long as ~) — if only you come, I won't worry about anything.

prompt: 彼女のことが___てならない。
explanation: てならない (cannot help feeling / extremely ~) — I can't help but worry about her.

prompt: 彼は有名な俳優___、全然威張らない。
optionsJson: ["なのに","のくせに","にしては","だから"]
explanation: なのに (even though / despite being) — even though he is a famous actor, he is not at all arrogant.

prompt: 失敗を恐れ___で、何もできない。
explanation: すぎる (too much) — being too afraid of failure, you can't do anything.

prompt: この問題は、大人___難しい。
explanation: でさえ (even for ~) — even for adults, this problem is difficult.

prompt: 彼女は元気そう___、実は疲れている。
explanation: だが (but / however) — she looks energetic, but actually she is tired.

prompt: 彼は日本語が___にもかかわらず、外国に住んでいる。
explanation: にもかかわらず (despite / in spite of) — despite being good at Japanese, he lives abroad.

prompt: 子供の頃の夢___、宇宙飛行士になることだった。
explanation: は (topic marker) — my dream as a child was to become an astronaut.

prompt: この機会を___ことができて、本当によかった。
optionsJson: ["生かす","生かし","生かして","生かさ"]
explanation: 機会を生かす (make use of the opportunity) — I'm really glad I was able to make use of this opportunity.

prompt: 今日___、絶対に仕事を終わらせる。
explanation: こそ (precisely ~ / this time for sure) — today is precisely when I will definitely finish the work.

prompt: 彼女はいつも元気___、みんなを明るい気持ちにさせる。
optionsJson: ["だから","なのに","のに","にしては"]
explanation: だから (so / that's why) — because she is always energetic, she makes everyone feel bright.

prompt: 彼の言葉が___てならない。
optionsJson: ["忘れられなく","忘れられ","忘れ","忘れなく"]
explanation: てならない (cannot help but ~ / unbearably ~) — I cannot help but be unable to forget his words.

prompt: 彼女は英語___でなく、フランス語も話せる。
explanation: だけでなく (not only ~ but also) — she can speak not only English but also French.

prompt: この本の主人公___、自分を重ねてしまう。
explanation: 〜に重ねる (overlap with / identify with ~) — I find myself overlapping with the protagonist of this book.

prompt: 旅行の計画を立てる___に、ガイドブックを読んだ。
explanation: ために (in order to) — I read a guidebook in order to make travel plans.

prompt: 彼の意見___、皆が納得した。
optionsJson: ["によって","のせいで","のおかげで","のために"]
explanation: によって (by means of / through) — everyone was convinced by his opinion.

prompt: この曲を聴く___、故郷を思い出す。
explanation: たびに (every time ~) — every time I listen to this song, I remember my hometown.

prompt: 就職活動中___、毎日面接を受けていた。
explanation: 〜は (topic marker) — during job hunting, I was having interviews every day.

prompt: もし嫌い___、食べなくていい。
explanation: なら (if / if that's the case) — if you don't like it, you don't have to eat it.

prompt: 最近は、仕事がうまくいっていない___で、元気がない。
explanation: せいで (because of ~ [negative]) — because of work not going well lately, I don't have energy.

prompt: 彼女は歌が上手な___、ダンスも得意だ。
explanation: 上に (in addition to) — in addition to being good at singing, she is also good at dancing.

prompt: この仕事は誰に___できる。
explanation: 誰でも (anyone / whoever) — anyone can do this job.

prompt: この試験さえ___、卒業できる。
optionsJson: ["通れば","通ったら","通るなら","通ると"]
explanation: さえ〜ば (if only ~ then) — if only you pass this exam, you can graduate.
